reasoning: The control 8.2.7 focuses on managing accounts and verifying evidence of account management practices. In Kubernetes, this translates to ensuring that RBAC is configured to enforce least privilege, reviewing service account usage, and ensuring audit logging is enabled to track access and changes. These checks help verify that access controls are properly managed and that there is evidence of such management through audit logs.
title: Interview personnel, examine documentation for managing accounts, and examine evidence to verify ...
